nasb.text: They answered them and said, “He is; see, he is ahead of you. Hurry now, for he has come into the city today, for the people have a sacrifice on the high place today.

esv.text: They answered, “He is; behold, he is just ahead of you. Hurry. He has come just now to the city, because the people have a sacrifice today on the high place.

cnv.text: 那些少女回答他們說：“在這裡！他就在你們前面，現在快去吧！他今天正到這城裡來，因為今天在邱壇上，人民有獻祭的事。

ccb.text: 她们答道：“他在这里，就在你们前面。你们快去吧，他今天刚到城里来，因为今天人们在丘坛献祭。
